subject: 25% across the board reduction in ene headcount

emails.subject: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.subject_base: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.body: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT YA HEARING ANYTHING ON THIS GEORGE DOWN--CRUDE FLOOR EVACUATED AND BROUGHT BACK

emails.subject: RE: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.subject_base: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.body: RE: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT no way. we're still paying $5000 for new employee referrals To: Arnold, John

emails.subject: RE: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.subject_base: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.body: that means nothing..uk is giving away boxter for new employees ans slicing 10% at same time To: Fraser, Jennifer

emails.subject: RE: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.subject_base: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.body: they're giving away a porsche boxster or a cardboard boxcutter? To: Arnold, John

emails.subject: RE: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.subject_base: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.body: porsche boxster (maybe the bmw one) instead or 5000 they raffle a car...hahahaha johnny..only exempt group is egm crude and products which keeps hiring and hiring also dont you think it was about time there was one fundamentals group where all information was shared and disseminated to trading To: Fraser, Jennifer

emails.subject: RE: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.subject_base: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.body: maybe, some specialization is beneficial though. To: Arnold, John

emails.subject: RE: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.subject_base: 25% ACROSS THE BOARD REDUCTION IN ENE HEADCOUNT
emails.body: no need to eliminate specialization but there is a huge amount of duplication.. (for the record i am not weaseling my way into the chief fundamentalist role)..i think the specialization could remain but teh information should be commonly housed and centrallly disseminated) For example, why dio we need 4 stack models..it would be better to concentrate our effort and knowledge on making on great one also in terms of headcount, elimination of dupplication means reduced costs....do we really need to be hiring 100 analysts a year.......? where are we going to put them all let's keep the strongest and ditch the rest To: Fraser, Jennifer
